home.title: Open sessions near you
home.subtitle: Join a table or create your own

auth.forbidden: You don't have permission to access this page

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

email.label: Email
email.duplicate: An account with that email already exists

password.label: Password
password.weak: At least 8 characters with letters and numbers

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

list.title: Sessions
list.heroSubtitleAuth: Your location is pre-filtered. Change it whenever you want.
list.heroSubtitleAnon: Filter and explore the upcoming tables freely. To join or create one, you'll need an account.
list.anonHint: Tip: <1>sign in</1> and the filters will match your area.
list.anonCtaTitle: Want to host your own table?
list.anonCtaSubtitle: Create a free account and publish your session. In less than a minute it'll be visible to every player in your area.
list.emptyBody: No sessions match those filters. Be the one to start the table.

detail.expansionLoadError: Could not load this expansion's details.
detail.expansionNoSummary: Summary not yet generated for this expansion.

chat.title: Chat
chat.waitlistNotice: You'll join the chat when you sign up as a player.
chat.empty: Be the first to write something.
chat.outsiderNotice: Sign up to join the chat.

close.title: Close table
close.body: You will close this table with {{count}} players. No new players will be able to join.
close.bodyWithWaitlist: You will close this table with {{count}} players. No new players will be able to join, but if someone cancels the {{waitlist}} in queue can enter.

cancelConfirm.title: Cancel session?
cancelConfirm.body: This action is irreversible: the session is marked as CANCELLED and the chat is deleted.
cancelConfirm.bodyWithPlayers: This action is irreversible: the session is marked as CANCELLED, the chat is deleted and the {{count}} signed-up players find out when they reload the page.
cancelConfirm.note: Signed-up players do not get a notification (the notifications module is not available yet).

edit.title: Edit session
edit.maxPlayersBelowMin: You cannot lower below {{min}} (there are already registered players).
edit.waitlistNote: ℹ️ There are {{count}} people in the queue — they will keep their position.

create.title: Create session
create.heroTitle: Set up the details of your table
create.publishHint_one: When you publish, other players can join until the last free spot is taken.
create.publishHint_other: When you publish, other players can join until all {{count}} free spots are taken.

preview.heading: This is how it will look

fields.title: Title
fields.creatorGuests: Are you bringing anyone with you?

errors.joinOwn: You cannot join your own session
errors.notParticipant: You are not in this session
errors.notOwner: Only the organiser can do this
errors.scheduledInPast: Date must be in the future
errors.maxBelowCurrent: Cannot reduce max below current registrations
errors.maxBelowGameMin: Max is below the game's minimum
errors.expansionWrongBase: One of the expansions does not belong to the base game
errors.expansionNotExpansion: One of the selected items is not an expansion
errors.guestsExceedMax: At least 1 spot must stay free for another player
errors.creatorCannotLeave: You can't leave your own session. If you're not going to play, cancel it.

empty.created: You haven't created any sessions yet.
empty.history: You don't have finished sessions yet.

hero.title: <line>Roll the dice.</line><line>Move your <1>piece</1>.</line><line><3>Play <2>🎲</2> now.</3></line>
hero.subtitle: Board game sessions with people <1>near you</1>. No private groups, no waiting for someone's reply.

quickSearch.label: Search for a session
quickSearch.gamePlaceholder: What do you feel like playing?

stats.activeSessionsCaption: There's a table waiting for you right now.

one.title: Find players
one.description: Filter by province, city and favourite game. No social networks. No messages no one reads.

two.title: Discover open sessions
two.description: Tables with free spots today. Hit "Sign me up" and done.

three.title: Organise meetups
three.description: Create your table, set spots, game and date. The community joins on its own.

community.title: Tables happening <1>now</1>.
community.waiting: Lara, Pablo and Rocío are waiting.

one.quote: "Starting a casual game of Terraforming Mars. Looking for a fourth."
one.body: Table open to intermediate or expert level. Snacks. Patience. Time. ~3h.

two.quote: "Trying Brass Birmingham for the first time. Need two more."
two.body: Open to any level. We've got the rulebook handy and patience to explain. ~2h30.

three.quote: "Wingspan Europe session with a light dinner first. Room for one more."
three.body: Relaxed vibe, easy-going game. Bring enthusiasm, that's all. ~2h.

ctaFinal.heading:
Your next table
is one <1>click away!
ctaFinal.body: Sign up free and start joining. No card. No commitment. No waiting.

footer.tagline: Roll the dice. Move your piece. Play now.

landing.title: Find players and sessions near you | Match&Play
landing.description: Discover open board game sessions, connect with players in your area and organise your next meetup with Match&Play.

login.title: Sign in | Match&Play
login.description: Access your Match&Play account and find board game sessions near you.

register.title: Create account | Match&Play
register.description: Join Match&Play and start discovering and organising board game sessions in your city.

help.intro: Here you'll find answers to common questions. This section will be expanded over time.
